decision_rationale: No paper reaches 0.70 completeness threshold. Best partial overlaps: ROLLMUX (phase scheduling) + LLMOrbit (circular taxonomy). 12-imam × per-imam-prompt × 12-phase-lock × lineage-transfer × zarif composite absent from all 8 papers. Primary v6 PASS aligns with verifier v6 PASS — Pattern E MITIGATED.
